mapper.update: INSERT INTO visitor_stats (visit_date, visit_count) VALUES (CURDATE(), 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visit_count = visit_count + 1
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(visit_count), 0) FROM visitor_stats WHERE visit_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(visit_count), 0) FROM visitor_stats WHERE visit_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(visit_count), 0) FROM visitor_stats WHERE visit_date = CURDATE()
